description: First comparison run: Copilot reference analysis of 38 Eclipse Platform 2025 commits

evaluations.message: JDT Clean-up Use String.replace() instead of String.replaceAll() when possible
evaluations.summary: Replace String.replaceAll() with String.replace() when the pattern is a literal string without regex metacharacters.

evaluations.message: Stop using deprecated Platform.run method — Use SafeRunner.run directly
evaluations.summary: Replace deprecated Platform.run() with SafeRunner.run().

evaluations.message: Removed unnecessary @SuppressWarnings("deprecation") from jdt.ui
evaluations.summary: Removed @SuppressWarnings("deprecation") annotations from 3 JDT UI preference cleanup classes (CleanUpConfigurationBlock, CleanUpTabPage, CodeFormatingTabPage). The diff shows only annotation line deletions (6 lines total). Determining whether a @SuppressWarnings is unnecessary requires knowing whether the suppressed code still references deprecated APIs — this needs type resolution beyond current DSL capability.
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Requires type-resolution analysis to determine which @SuppressWarnings("deprecation") annotations no longer suppress actual deprecation warnings. The DSL cannot resolve deprecation status of referenced APIs.

evaluations.message: Remove unused NLS entry
evaluations.summary: Removed unused NLS constant from WorkbenchMessages.java and its corresponding entry in messages.properties (3 line deletions total). Detecting unused NLS entries requires cross-file reference analysis to verify no code references the constant — this is beyond current single-file DSL pattern matching.
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Requires cross-file reference analysis to identify which NLS message constants are unreferenced. The DSL operates on single-file patterns and cannot determine field usage across compilation units.

evaluations.message: Remove unused JUnit Rule and TestName imports
evaluations.summary: Removed unused JUnit 4 TestName rule imports and field declarations from 3 test classes (PartRenderingEngineTests, TestUnitRegistrationWindows, TextEditorPluginTest — 16 line deletions). Also removed debug println statements. Detecting unused imports/fields requires whole-class reference analysis beyond current DSL capability.
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Requires usage analysis to determine which imports and field declarations are unreferenced. While Eclipse JDT has built-in "organize imports" and "unused field" cleanups, the DSL cannot express reference-counting logic.

evaluations.message: Performance: Cache method calls in loops and optimize string concatenation
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Requires loop body analysis to verify collection is not modified during iteration
evaluations.summary: Cache repeated method calls (like getChildren()) in loop variables.

evaluations.message: Migrate org.eclipse.ui.tests.navigator from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Full JUnit migration needs lifecycle annotation replacement plus cross-method analysis
evaluations.summary: Migrate entire test suite from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.

evaluations.message: Migrate org.eclipse.ui.monitoring.tests from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Full JUnit migration needs lifecycle annotation replacement plus cross-method analysis
evaluations.summary: Migrate monitoring test suite from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.

evaluations.message: Migrate 5 tests to JUnit 5 using CloseTestWindowsExtension
evaluations.summary: Migrate tests using custom CloseTestWindowsExtension for JUnit 5.

evaluations.message: Add cleanup to use module imports where possible
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Needs module-aware import resolution to determine which module to import
evaluations.summary: New JDT cleanup to replace individual type imports with module imports (Java 25+).

evaluations.message: Enhance convert to switch expressions to include more scenarios
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Needs control flow analysis to verify switch can be converted to expression
evaluations.summary: Enhance existing switch expression conversion to handle non-returning switch statements.

evaluations.message: Fix cleanup to replace java.specification.version property
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Requires constant lookup for system property name mappings
evaluations.summary: Replace System.getProperty() calls for well-known properties with API constants.

evaluations.message: Do not offer to add type arguments where diamond operator would do
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Requires type inference analysis to know when diamond is applicable
evaluations.summary: Avoid suggesting explicit type arguments when diamond operator is sufficient.

evaluations.message: Refactor StringCleanUp to jdt.core.manipulation
evaluations.languageChangeNeeded: Requires cross-module refactoring with extension point and build system changes
evaluations.summary: Move StringCleanUp implementation from jdt.ui to jdt.core.manipulation for jdt.ls reuse.

evaluations.message: Refactor PatternCleanUp to jdt.core.manipulation
evaluations.summary: Move PatternCleanUp implementation from jdt.ui to jdt.core.manipulation.

evaluations.message: Refactor UnimplementedCodeCleanUp to jdt.core.manipulation
evaluations.summary: Move UnimplementedCodeCleanUp from jdt.ui to jdt.core.manipulation.

evaluations.message: Refactor more clean-ups to jdt.core.manipulation
evaluations.summary: Move additional CleanUp implementations from jdt.ui to jdt.core.manipulation.

evaluations.message: Mass refactor of LocalCorrectionsSubProcessor methods to base
evaluations.summary: Extract base methods for LocalCorrectionsSubProcessor to enable jdt.ls reuse.

evaluations.message: Refactor TypeParametersCleanUp to jdt.core.manipulation
evaluations.summary: Move TypeParametersCleanUp from jdt.ui to jdt.core.manipulation.

evaluations.message: Fix Unnecessary Array clean-up to not remove NLS markers
evaluations.summary: Fix bug where removing unnecessary array creation also removed NLS markers on the same line.

evaluations.message: Fix control blocks clean-up to preserve else comments properly
evaluations.summary: Fix control block clean-up that was removing comments attached to else blocks.

evaluations.message: Do not remove lone empty commented return statement in a lambda
evaluations.summary: Fix clean-up that incorrectly removed a commented-out return in a lambda.

evaluations.message: Highlight deprecation of canonical record constructor
evaluations.summary: Add deprecation highlighting for record canonical constructors.

evaluations.message: Fix add final for fields cleanup for generic class and lambda
evaluations.summary: Fix add-final-for-fields cleanup that failed for generic classes and lambdas.

irrelevantCommits.reason: API removal (addFastView), not a transformation pattern
Bug fix (remove redundant checks), not reusable pattern
Marking for removal, not a code transformation
Marking for removal, not a code transformation
Removing commented-out code, no reusable pattern
Adding final modifier to field, too simple for DSL rule
Adding @Deprecated annotations, not a transformation pattern
API removal, not a reusable pattern

MISSING_API_CONTEXT.description: Gemini would miss Platform.run → SafeRunner.run without Eclipse API context

MISSING_DSL_RULE.description: String.replaceAll → String.replace pattern was not in existing hint files
MISSING_DSL_RULE.improvement: Pattern discovered and added to mining examples

MISSING_TYPE_CONTEXT.description: JUnit migration requires knowledge of JUnit 4/5 API correspondence
MISSING_TYPE_CONTEXT.improvement: Added JUnit 4→5 migration patterns to eclipse-api-context.md

CATEGORY_MISMATCH.description: Architecture migrations (moving classes between modules) should be RED, not YELLOW
CATEGORY_MISMATCH.improvement: Added Example 5 (RED) to mining-examples.md to clarify

discoveredRules.description: Replace String.replaceAll() with String.replace() for literal patterns

promptResources: Updated mining-examples.md with 8 real Eclipse 2025 commit examples
Updated eclipse-api-context.md with Platform.run deprecation and JUnit 4→5 patterns
Added String.replaceAll→replace pattern as discoverable rule
pipelineChanges: Integrated HintFileUpdater into MiningCli pipeline for GREEN+VALID evaluations
HintFileUpdater writes .sandbox-hint files automatically after mining
nextSteps: Run actual Gemini mining on these 38 commits to get LLM results
Compare Gemini output with this Copilot reference using --comparison-mode
Iterate: analyze gaps and feed improvements back into prompts
